name: Lemon Omelet-Souffle
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 9-inch wide ovenproof frying pan (attractive enough for serving) or in a cake pan, combine 3 tablespoons sugar, lemon and orange juices, and cornstarch; set aside.
2. In a large bowl, beat egg whites on high speed until foamy, then gradually beat in 11 tablespoons sugar until the whites hold stiff peaks.
3. In another bowl, beat egg yolks until thick with remaining 2 tablespoons sugar, peel, and vanilla. Gently fold yolks into the whites.
4. Over medium heat, stir citrus juice mixture until boiling. Carefully remove from heat and spoon egg mixture in large dollops into the hot saucepan.
5. Bake in a 350°F oven until the omelet-souffle is golden brown and jiggles only slightly in the center when gently shaken, approximately 15-20 minutes. Serve with remaining sauce and offer sweetened light sour cream or vanilla nonfat yogurt to add to taste.
